description: Caught-error shape is NORMALIZED at the applet boundary: only name+message are observed, never .stack.
divergenceArea: error .message / .stack shape (NORMALIZED at the host boundary)

tolerance.notes: NORMALIZED: .stack is engine-specific (frames, line/col, formatting) and MUST NOT appear in observable output; a conformant applet returns only error.name + error.message. Built-in error .message text (e.g. TypeError on null access) can itself differ between engines, so vectors normalize to name + a stable applet-authored message, not the raw engine message. See cross-engine-conformance.md §Normalization.
